plurals.name: screen_invite_users_confirm_dialog_subtitle
plurals.item: "You currently don’t have any chats with this contact. Confirm inviting them to this room before continuing."
"You currently don’t have any chats with these contacts. Confirm inviting them to this room before continuing."

plurals.name: screen_invite_users_confirm_dialog_title
plurals.item: "Invite a new contact to this room?"
